pageContext.name: EZ-034 Geno Breaker (Repackage Version)
pageContext.description: Geno Breaker, one of our most popular original products in Kotobukiya's HMM Zoids Lineup, comes revamped in an all-new repackaged version. The model has been better refined and can now be more naturally posed when shooting its Charged Particle Cannon!   Each part has been updated for a wider range of flexibility but stays true to the original coloration.   Additional all-clear and clear red parts have been included in this kit as an additional bonus item and can be customized with model paint. Be sure to add this Zoid to your very own collection today!
